# GitHub Repository Settings

## Description (one-liner for repo)
Modern open-source molecule editor — draw structures, reactions & SMARTS queries in your browser. Pure JS, zero deps, 535 built-in molecules.

## Topics
molecule-editor, chemistry, smiles, smarts, cheminformatics, molecular-editor, svg, javascript, drug-discovery, reaction-mapping, open-source, bioinformatics, computational-chemistry, rdkit-alternative, chemical-structure, atom-atom-mapping

## How to apply

### Via GitHub CLI:
```bash
gh repo edit asad/bime \
  --description "Modern open-source molecule editor — draw structures, reactions & SMARTS queries in your browser. Pure JS, zero deps, 535 built-in molecules." \
  --add-topic molecule-editor \
  --add-topic chemistry \
  --add-topic smiles \
  --add-topic smarts \
  --add-topic cheminformatics \
  --add-topic molecular-editor \
  --add-topic svg \
  --add-topic javascript \
  --add-topic drug-discovery \
  --add-topic reaction-mapping \
  --add-topic open-source \
  --add-topic bioinformatics \
  --add-topic computational-chemistry \
  --add-topic rdkit-alternative \
  --add-topic chemical-structure \
  --add-topic atom-atom-mapping
```

### Via browser:
1. Go to https://github.com/asad/bime
2. Click the gear icon next to "About"
3. Paste the description
4. Add each topic in the Topics field
